settings.title: Settings
settings.promo_desc: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited vehicles, AI analysis, and professional reports.
settings.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
settings.msg_err: An error occurred while updating the profile.
settings.notif_saved_full: Settings saved. 'Upcoming Service' and 'Fuel Alerts' are active!
settings.pass_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.pass_success: Your password has been successfully updated.
settings.pass_err_general: An error occurred while updating the password:
settings.sub_cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your Premium subscription? You will lose access to Premium features.
settings.restore_confirm: Vehicle successfully restored to your garage!\n\nWould you like to go to your garage?
settings.prem_cancel_desc: If you cancel, you can continue using the features until the end of your billing cycle (Oct 12, 2024).
settings.free_title: You are currently on the Free Plan
settings.free_desc: Upgrade to explore the full potential of CarSync Pro.
settings.legal_desc: Professional vehicle management, maintenance tracking, and AI-powered analysis application.
settings.legal_data_desc: CarSync Pro uses <1>Google Gemini API</1> to provide features like invoice analysis and vehicle defect prediction.
settings.rem_desc: Set default maintenance intervals to be suggested automatically when adding logs.
settings.sec_sms_desc: A code will be sent to your phone upon login.
settings.sec_2fa_active: Two-factor authentication is enabled. A verification code will be sent to your registered phone number on your next login.
settings.wipe_modal_desc: This action <1>cannot be undone</1>. All your vehicle records, settings, and history will be permanently deleted. The application will return to its initial state.

dashboard.load_error: An error occurred while loading settings.
dashboard.image_upload_error: An error occurred while uploading images.
dashboard.image_limit_error: Maximum of 4 vehicle photos can be uploaded.
dashboard.image_limit_warning: Maximum of 4 photos can be uploaded. Only the first {{count}} photos were added.
dashboard.appt_cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
dashboard.health_perfect: In perfect condition. Continue regular checkups.
dashboard.health_good: In good condition, but some maintenance is approaching.
dashboard.health_attention: Attention needed. Do not delay service checks.

dashboard.dtc_error: Code could not be analyzed. Please check the code or verify your internet connection.
dashboard.fuel_disclaimer: *Data is based on your fuel logs and mileage entries over the last 6 months.
dashboard.customize_desc: Adjust the order and visibility of cards

dashboard.restore_confirm: Vehicle restored! Would you like to go to the garage?

onboarding.step1_desc: Access critical information such as your vehicle's health status, upcoming maintenance, and estimated market value here.
onboarding.step2_desc: New! You can have an AI-powered chat with your car using the button at the bottom right.
onboarding.step3_desc: Use these shortcuts to quickly add fuel or service records.
onboarding.step4_desc: Enter diagnostic trouble codes to get AI-powered solution suggestions and explanations.

budget.title: Budget Goals
budget.subtitle: Manage monthly spending limits
budget.no_goals_desc: Set monthly spending limits, get alerted when exceeded, and reach your financial goals.
tips: Track fuel spending, develop efficient driving habits.
Perform periodic checks on time before exceeding maintenance budget.
Manage total family budget by creating an "All Vehicles" goal.

garage.create_desc: Create a shared garage to share vehicle data with family or team.
garage.join_desc: Enter the 6-digit code provided by the owner.
garage.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave the garage?
garage.empty_desc: Share vehicle data with family or team. Everyone accesses based on role.
garage.feat_2: Per-vehicle sharing — choose what to share
garage.info_v: Vehicles you share can be viewed by members. They can add records based on roles.
garage.no_v: No vehicles found in the garage.
garage.title: My Garage
garage.no_vehicle_yet: Add your first vehicle to start tracking.
garage.transfer_desc: Show this code to the new owner.
garage.step3_desc: Add a photo and specify the vehicle status.
garage.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{model}} and all its history? This action cannot be undone.

qr_card.title: Vehicle Card & QR
qr_card.subtitle: Show to service personnel or share
qr_card.use_case_1: Scan QR for technician at service to see full history
qr_card.use_case_2: Show card to buyer during sale for transparency
qr_card.use_case_3: Use as a quick info card for drivers in fleet vehicles
qr_card.history_subtitle: Scan at service, see all history
qr_card.share_text:
🚗 {{brand}} {{model}} ({{year}})
📍 {{plate}}
📊 {{mileage}} km
❤️ Health: {{score}}/100

Tracked with CarSync Pro.

comparison.title: Vehicle Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Which vehicle is more economical?
comparison.economic_vehicle: More economical vehicle in this period
comparison.radar_desc: High score shows better performance in each category
comparison.radar_legend_note: Cost and fuel axes are reverse normalized — lower spending = higher score.
comparison.min_two_desc: You need to add at least 2 vehicles to your garage to compare them.

payment.title: Make Payment
payment.processing_desc: Please wait, communicating with your bank...
payment.success_desc: Your transaction has been approved. Your receipt has been sent to your email address.

analytics.title: Financial Analytics
analytics.no_data_desc: Add a vehicle to your garage to see analytics.
analytics.comparison_desc: Compare fuel consumption, maintenance costs, and health scores of two vehicles side by side.
analytics.report_desc: Download your monthly or yearly expense reports as PDF.
analytics.pdf_premium_toast: PDF reports are a Premium feature. Click to upgrade to Premium.
analytics.sale_report_premium_toast: Sale report is a Premium feature.
analytics.comparison_premium_toast: Vehicle comparison is a Premium feature.
analytics.sale_report_desc: Professional summary for listing your vehicle

add_record.tour_quick_desc: You can quickly select the action from the horizontal menu or customize it from the list.
add_record.tour_ai_desc: Take a photo of the receipt or invoice; AI will automatically fill in the amount and date.
add_record.tour_remind_desc: When you save the record, an automatic reminder is created for the next maintenance.
add_record.err_req: Please enter at least mileage or cost.
add_record.err_save: An error occurred while adding the record. Please try again.
add_record.title: Add Record
add_record.notes_ph: Add details about parts used, brands, or special findings...
add_record.reminder_desc: Notify me for the next service
add_record.reminder_info: Reminder will be set according to general service intervals (+5,000 km or 6 months).
add_record.reminder_note: Auto reminder: in +{{km}} km or 6 months.

logs.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
logs.err_delete: Could not delete record. Please try again.
logs.title: Service Logs
logs.search_ph: Search service type, vehicle or notes...
logs.no_record_yet: No service logs yet. Add a new record.

car_chat.mic_error: Could not access microphone. Check permissions.
car_chat.confirm_clear: Do you want to clear the chat history?
car_chat.encryption_note: Chat is end-to-end encrypted. Your car keeps secrets. 🤫
car_chat.greeting_maint: Ahem... I've been carrying your weight for {{mileage}} kilometers. I think it's time for a service, what do you say? 🤒
car_chat.greeting_ok: Hello boss! Tank is full, engine is cold. Where are we flooring it today? 🏎️💨

predictive.title: AI Maintenance Assistant
predictive.subtitle: Analyze your vehicle's future needs
predictive.ai_processing: Processing service history and vehicle data
predictive.disclaimer: Predictions are generated by AI analysis based on your service history and vehicle data. Actual values may vary depending on your vehicle's usage conditions.
predictive.reason_default: Calculated according to general maintenance schedule.

fuel.title: Fuel Finder
fuel.loc_err: Could not get location. Please check browser permissions.
fuel.real_prices_desc: Set the <1>VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY</1> environment variable for real price data, or generate community prices using the <2>Report Price</2> button at stations.

trip.title: Trip & Fuel Planner
trip.info: Enter distance and fuel details to calculate the estimated trip cost.

smart_notifs.title: Smart Notifications
smart_notifs.subtitle: Automatic alerts based on your vehicle's status
smart_notifs.crit_alert_desc: There are situations that require immediate attention for your vehicle's safety or health.
smart_notifs.push_desc: Be instantly notified of important alerts
smart_notifs.empty_desc_all: Great news! Everything looks fine with your vehicle.
smart_notifs.empty_desc_filter: No notifications match your selected filter.
smart_notifs.rule_oil_desc: If it's been 10,000+ km since the last oil change
smart_notifs.rule_service_desc: If it's been 15,000+ km since the last service
smart_notifs.rule_tire_desc: If it's been 10,000+ km since the last rotation
smart_notifs.rule_brake_desc: If it's been 30,000+ km since the last brake service
smart_notifs.rule_battery_desc: If it's been 60,000+ km since the last battery replacement
smart_notifs.rule_inspection_desc: If vehicle inspection has exceeded 2 years
smart_notifs.rule_low_health_desc: If vehicle health score falls below 50
smart_notifs.rule_no_fuel_desc: If no fuel record has been entered within 30 days
smart_notifs.rule_achievement_desc: Celebration notification for mileage and maintenance achievements
smart_notifs.msg_oil_crit_body: Oil change for {{vehicle}} has not been done for 12,000 km. Schedule an appointment immediately for engine health.
smart_notifs.msg_oil_warn_body: There are {{rem}} km left for oil change for {{vehicle}}. We suggest you plan ahead.
smart_notifs.msg_serv_crit_body: {{vehicle}} has covered {{km}} km since the last periodic maintenance. General check is required.
smart_notifs.msg_serv_warn_body: Service time for {{vehicle}} is approaching. You can make an appointment for periodic checks.
smart_notifs.msg_tire_body: It's time for rotation for {{vehicle}} for balanced tire wear.
smart_notifs.msg_brake_body: Don't forget to have the brake discs and pads checked for {{vehicle}} for your safety.
smart_notifs.msg_batt_body: {{vehicle}} battery may have reached 5 years or 60,000 km. Voltage check is recommended.
smart_notifs.msg_health_body: {{vehicle}} health status is approaching critical level. Please review details.
smart_notifs.msg_fuel_body: Last fuel record for {{vehicle}} was entered {{days}} days ago. Update the record for data tracking.
smart_notifs.msg_budget_body: Your expenses for {{vehicle}} this month exceeded 5,000 TL.
smart_notifs.msg_ach_body: Congratulations! {{vehicle}} has covered exactly 100,000 km. To many more kilometers!
smart_notifs.msg_welcome_body: Smart notification system is ready for you to track your vehicle in the best way.

ins.title: Insurance & Inspection
ins.subtitle: Document and date tracking calendar
ins.empty_desc: Add insurance, inspection, tax and other document dates to get reminders.
ins.info: Alerts will appear on the dashboard when dates approach. Data is stored locally.

theme.title: Theme & Customization
theme.subtitle: Personalize the app
theme.opt_cost_desc: Monthly expense chart on main screen
theme.opt_header_desc: Header area taking up less space
theme.reset_desc: All theme preferences will revert to default.

report.title: PDF Report
report.subtitle: Service history & financial analysis
report.opt_summary_desc: Total expense, km analysis, fuel consumption
report.opt_details_desc: All service records sorted by date
report.empty_msg: No records found for this vehicle and period.
report.pdf_c1: Cover page — vehicle info and report summary
report.pdf_c2: Expense distribution table by maintenance type
report.pdf_c4: Detailed service records (date, type, km, amount, note)
report.pdf_c5: Cost per km and fuel consumption analysis

importExport.no_vehicle_desc: You don't have a vehicle to transfer.
importExport.title: Transfer History
importExport.info_txt: This QR code is for one-time use. Upon completion, vehicle ownership and all history will be transferred.
importExport.err_cam_denied: Camera permission denied. Please allow it in browser settings.
importExport.err_cam_notfound: Camera not found. Make sure your device has a camera.
importExport.import_qr_desc: Scan the seller's QR code to instantly import vehicle history.
importExport.manual_fallback: Enter code manually if no camera
importExport.manual_hint: Get transfer code from seller (TR-ABC-123 format)

damageDetect.title: Damage Detection
damageDetect.subtitle: AI-powered visual damage analysis
damageDetect.analyzing_scan: AI is scanning for damage points
damageDetect.disclaimer: Damage detection and cost estimates are generated by AI visual analysis. For precise results, please visit an authorized service or auto appraiser.

premium.title: CarSync Premium
premium.desc: Remove all limits in vehicle management and access professional features.
premium.testimonial: Tracking fuel costs is now so easy. I saved ₺800 in a month!
premium.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

fuelReminder.title: Fuel Tracker
fuelReminder.subtitle: Range estimate and refill reminder
fuelReminder.crit_desc: Estimated ~{{r}} km range left. Refill immediately.
fuelReminder.warn_desc: {{p}}% fuel left. Refill is recommended soon.
fuelReminder.tip_1: Regular tire pressure checks save 3% fuel.
fuelReminder.tip_2: Avoid sudden braking and acceleration — steady speed uses less fuel.
fuelReminder.tip_3: Starting trip when engine is warm is more efficient than cold start.
fuelReminder.disclaimer: Range estimation is calculated from past fuel records. Driving conditions, traffic, and AC usage can affect actual range. Check your fuel gauge for definitive results.
fuelReminder.no_data_desc: Add a fuel supply record to make an estimate. Entering liter info starts consumption analysis.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved. You can return to the home page to continue.

onboarding.w_desc: Track your vehicle, manage maintenance, analyze costs. Everything in one place.
onboarding.f_1_desc: Track oil, tires, brakes — get warned before it's due.
onboarding.f_2_desc: View monthly expenses, set budget goals, analyze trend graphs.
onboarding.f_3_desc: Detect damage from photos, get maintenance tips, ask questions.
onboarding.f_4_desc: Scan at service, see full history. Ensure transparency in sales.
onboarding.f_5_desc: Share vehicle data with family or team, everyone in their role.
onboarding.f_6_desc: Range estimation, consumption trend, finding cheapest stations.
onboarding.av_1_title: What's the brand of your vehicle?
onboarding.av_1_desc: Quickly select or type to search
onboarding.av_err: Could not save vehicle. Please try again later.
onboarding.av_err_req: Brand, model and plate are required.
onboarding.n_desc: Let us remind you of important dates and maintenance times.
onboarding.n_1_desc: 9,800 km passed since last change — service needed soon.
onboarding.n_2_desc: 14 days left until your traffic insurance expires.
onboarding.n_3_desc: You have an appointment tomorrow at 10:00 — Auto Service Corporate.
onboarding.n_denied: Notifications denied. You can change it in settings.
onboarding.c_desc: CarSync Pro is yours now. Here are a few things you can do first:

appt.subtitle: Planning and reminder calendar
appt.alert_overdue: There are {{count}} overdue appointments — plan them now!
appt.no_appt_desc: Create a service, inspection or maintenance appointment. You will receive an automatic reminder when the date approaches.
